# Design Decision Record

Short decision title.

## Date

YYYY-MM-DD

## Status

Proposed / Accepted / Rejected / Superseded

## Context

What problem, flow, page, or constraint led to this decision?

| Option | Pros | Cons | Risks |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Decision Made

What did we decide?

## Reasoning

Why is this the strongest option?

- Positive:
- Negative:
- Follow-up needed:
